title: Gulliver's Travels
director: Dave Fleischer, Willard Bowsky, Orestes Calpini
writer: Jonathan Swift, Edmond Seward, Dan Gordon
actors: Jessica Dragonette, Lanny Ross, Pinto Colvig
plot: A doctor washes ashore on an island inhabited by little people.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
